// note: Strict TypeScript for the admin-web (docs/stack-matrix.md). Extends the config SvelteKit generates (paths for $lib/$app, rootDirs, isolatedModules, verbatimModuleSyntax, moduleResolution=bundler). The generated `include` already covers src/**, tests/** and vite.config.ts — do not re-declare it here (SvelteKit owns it). These compilerOptions only ADD the strict guarantees on top.
